body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: 03 - OAM Functions for the Service Sub-Layer
08 - BGP Flow Specification for DetNet Flow Mapping
09 - Services Deployment Guideline in DetNet Network
11 - Micro-burst Decreasing in Layer3 Network for Low-Latency Traffic
